seoTitle: Wrathung vs Wroxham — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Wrathung and Wroxham. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Wrathung and Wroxham.
heading: Wrathung vs Wroxham — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Wrathung, Victoria and Wroxham, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Wroxham has a lower overall climate risk score (34/100) compared to Wrathung (40/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Wrathung or Wroxham safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Wrathung has a flood risk score of 52/100, while Wroxham scores 26/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Wrathung scores 39/100 for bushfire risk. Wroxham scores 39/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Wrathung or Wroxham?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Wroxham has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.48% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
